steps.title: Compare the equations
steps.content: Multiply the first equation by $3$: $3(0.5x+1.2y=9)$ gives $1.5x+3.6y=27$.

steps.title: Interpret the result
steps.content: That is exactly the second equation, so the two equations represent the same line.

steps.title: Choose the solution count
steps.content: Every point on that line satisfies both equations, so the system has infinitely many solutions. That matches choice A.
